hooks.command: bash -c 'if [[ "$TOOL_PARAM_file_path" == *.py ]]; then echo "🔍 Type checking Python file: $TOOL_PARAM_file_path" && if command -v dmypy &> /dev/null; then dmypy run -- ragzoom --ignore-missing-imports --no-error-summary --check-untyped-defs; else mypy ragzoom --ignore-missing-imports --no-error-summary --check-untyped-defs; fi; fi'
